column8: Even if you only have a ___________money, you can still have a great time at your local open-air market.
column9: The clothes_____________cheap, and the fruit____________cheap, too!
column10: Often, the food in your local supermarket_____________travelled a long way, but at the market you know that you're buying food which has been produced locally.
column11: The vegetables_____________fresh, even if you go late in the day when there are only a___________left.
column12: Support your local market and help local farmers. Contact your Town Hall to find out if there are___________open-air markets in your area.
